variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 5295 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 5295 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 5295 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 185.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 165.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 150.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 335.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 316.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 240.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF25069 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5295
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF25069 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5295
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF25069 air filter offers more filtering surface than standard air filters, is located above the engine to draw cool, clean air, needs less maintenance time and cost, and has easy filter removal.
